name: Consec Corporation
summary: Consec Corporation manufactures and sells drilling and sawing equipment in Japan and internationally. It offers hand, wall, and plunge cutter diamond tools, as well as wire saws and core drill products; automatic feeding systems, hydraulic units, fiber optic cable laying robots, and road grinding machines; and diamond core bits, blades, and wires under the Hakken brand name. The company also undertakes special construction contract works; and sells construction machinery, housing and living related equipment, and OA equipment. In addition, it provides life insurance agency services; offers business IT services, including systems outsourcing support; and rents real estate facilities. Consec Corporation was founded in 1967 and is headquartered in Hiroshima, Japan.
